title: Subscribe | NIH News in Health
content: Subscribe Email alerts: NIH News in Health email alerts are now through NIH Listserv . To receive email alerts when new issues of NIH News in Health are posted online, visit https://list.nih.gov/cgi-bin/wa.exe?SUBED1=NIHNEWSINHEALTH&A=1 . To update your subscription visit: https://list.nih.gov/cgi-bin/wa.exe?A0=nihnewsinhealth . If you’re having trouble, please email us at nihnewsinhealth@od.nih.gov . Print subscriptions: Print copies are available free of charge for offices, clinics, community centers and libraries within the U.S. Please email us at nihnewsinhealth@od.nih.gov . Please include your mailing address and tell us how many copies you would like.
